Designed specifically for Australian conditions, this system replaces your factory exhaust with mandrel•bent piping, high•flow mufflers, and premium•grade stainless steel construction that outlasts and outperforms OEM equipment. Performance Benefits The performance gains from the Fortuner 2.8L TD, 2016•Current, 3in Centre Muffler aren't just numbers on a dyno sheet — you'll feel the difference every time you accelerate. Reduced backpressure means your engine breathes easier, spools turbos faster, and delivers throttle response that puts a smile on your face.
